chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1809 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag „A‟ 2. For hearing of CMA No.7144/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 05-11-2025 Mr. Ghulam Murtaza Shaikh, Advocate along with Petitioners Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Mr. Gulzar Ahmed Malano, Assistant PG for the State along with Inspector Hasnain Shah, Investigating Officer Crime No.66 of 2025 of PS Jhangro, Rohri. >>>>>..<<<<< Learned AAG files statements of Respondents No.2 and 4, which are taken on record. Mr. Abdul Haseeb Khuhro, Advocate files vakalatnama as well as certain documents, which are also taken on record. Inspector Hasnain Raza Shah, Investigating Officer Crime No.66 of 2025 of Police Station, Jhangro, District Sukur is present and submits that he has recorded 161 CrPC statement of Petitioner No.1, namely Mst. Ghulam Kubra, in which she has stated that nobody has enticed or abducted her but she has contracted marriage with Petitioner No.2, with her own free will. She further stated that the FIR lodged against her husband and others is false and fabricated. The Investigating Officer further submits that after completing the investigation in view of the statement of the alleged abductee, Mst. Ghulam Kubar, the Petitioner No.1, he will submit the report before the concerned Court of Law having jurisdiction for disposal of case under “C” class. On such statement of the Investigation Officer, the Counsel for the Petitioners seeks disposal of the instant Constitutional Petition.

Ghulam Kubar, the Petitioner No.1, he will submit the report before the concerned Court of Law having jurisdiction for disposal of case under “C” class. On such statement of the Investigation Officer, the Counsel for the Petitioners seeks disposal of the instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the Petition is disposed of along with listed application with directions to Investigating Officer to file such report, as suggested by him within 15 (fifteen) days before the Court of Law having jurisdiction. However, the official respondents are directed to provide legal protection to the petitioners in accordance with the law. Judge Judge ARBROHI
